flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at University of Bridgeport vs the 2018–2022 baseline (1.4k vs 2.5k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Bridgeport fell 15% between 2021 and 2024 (33.8% → 28.7%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at University of Bridgeport fell 11% between 2021 and 2024 (1.7k → 1.5k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Bridgeport fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
